finalized_plan.description: Retrieve the official 2023 IPCC report (85-page version) by using the search_agent tool to locate a reliable and authoritative PDF copy
Once the PDF is obtained, use the inspect_file_as_text tool to extract the entire text content of the PDF, ensuring that the text content includes page numbering information
Perform a page-by-page analysis on the extracted text to search for the exact phrase "nuclear energy" (or close variants) on each page, recording the page numbers where the phrase appears
Verify the list of page numbers by checking the context to ensure that all occurrences have been correctly identified
Count the unique page numbers from the analysis to produce the definitive numeric answer
Provide the final answer with the numeric count (and the list of page numbers if available) using the final_answer tool

root_cause_reasoning: Unable to invoke the search_agent, and unable to locate the document
